signin.errOAuthCallback: Error returning from the provider — check the Redirect URI in the developer console (must be /api/auth/callback/<provider>).

signin.errOAuthAccountNotLinked: This email is already linked to another platform — sign in with the one you used first.
signin.errAccessDenied: Access denied (account banned or consent withheld).

quests.title: DAILY QUESTS
quests.subtitle: 3 tasks every day. Complete them, claim, grab Ghost Tokens.
quests.allDoneMsg: You earned {total} GT total from daily quests. Reset at 00:00.

quests.how1: The Discord bot tracks your activity (messages, voice) and updates progress automatically.
quests.how2: Enter drop codes during the live stream (Ghost drops a code in chat → be first to type it).
quests.how3: When progress hits the target, click CLAIM — tokens land in your account.
quests.how4: Everything resets at 00:00. Unclaimed quests from yesterday disappear (claim the day they're generated!).

terms.metaDesc: Terms of use for the Ghost Empire portal.
terms.title: TERMS
terms.s1i1: These terms set out the rules for using the Ghost Empire portal (hereinafter: Portal) available at ghost-empire-web.vercel.app.
terms.s1i2: The Portal operator is Gh0s77tt — a streamer active on Twitch, Kick and Discord.
terms.s1i3: Using the Portal requires creating an account via OAuth (Twitch or Discord) and accepting these terms and the <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.
terms.s2i1: An account is created automatically on your first OAuth sign-in.
terms.s2i2: Every user receives 500 Ghost Tokens (GT) as a welcome bonus.
terms.s2i3: A user can link multiple platforms (Twitch + Discord) to a single account.
terms.s2i4: Account data (avatar, nickname) is synced with the OAuth provider on every sign-in.
terms.s2i5: The user agrees not to create multiple accounts to bypass limits or abuse the economy.
terms.s3i1: Ghost Tokens are the Portal's internal virtual currency — they have NO monetary value and cannot be exchanged for money or resold.
terms.s3i2: GT are earned through activity: Discord messages, voice time, drop codes on live, daily quests, events.
terms.s3i3: GT can only be spent in the Portal shop on rewards (Steam keys, CS2 skins, gifted subs, cosmetics).
terms.s3i4: The Operator reserves the right to change prices, availability and the reward list without prior notice.
terms.s3i5: GT are forfeited when an account is deleted and are non-refundable.
terms.s3i6: Attempts to obtain GT dishonestly (bots, multi-accounts, exploits) result in loss of tokens + a ban.
terms.s4i1: Shop purchases are final — GT are deducted immediately.
terms.s4i2: Physical rewards and game keys are delivered manually — contact via a Discord ticket. Delivery time: up to 7 days.
terms.s4i3: Some rewards have requirements: minimum level, sub tier (T1/T2/T3/OG/DUAL), subscription tenure in months.
terms.s4i4: If a reward cannot be delivered (out of stock, error) — the Operator refunds the GT.
terms.s4i5: Rewards are non-refundable after delivery (Steam keys are irreversible).
terms.s5i1: Events (giveaway, raffle, contest, happy_hour) are run by the Operator.
terms.s5i2: Winners are drawn with a cryptographically-secure algorithm (node:crypto.randomInt). The algorithm is fair and open (the code is on GitHub).
terms.s5i3: Raffles: 1 ticket = 1 chance. Each ticket is a separate entry — buying more increases your odds proportionally.
terms.s5i4: A giveaway/raffle win cannot be exchanged for GT or other rewards.
terms.s5i5: Some events have requirements (e.g. "active subscriber") — checked at draw time.
terms.s6b2: Using bots, scripts or autoclickers to earn tokens
terms.s6b4: Attempting technical exploits (SQL injection, XSS, brute-forcing drop codes)
terms.s6b5: Offensive or illegal content in bio, username or social links
terms.s6b6: Exploiting economy bugs (e.g. negative prices) instead of reporting them
terms.s6b7: Selling / trading / lending the account to others
terms.s7i1: A violation of the terms results in (at the Operator's discretion): a warning, loss of GT, a temporary ban (1-30 days), a permanent ban.
terms.s7i2: Permanent ban = loss of all GT and unfulfilled rewards.
terms.s7i3: A ban is the Operator's decision and is not subject to appeal, unless there is an obvious misunderstanding.
terms.s7i4: A banned user may reach out via Discord for clarification.
terms.s8i1: The Portal is provided "as is" — the Operator does not guarantee 100% uptime or freedom from bugs.
terms.s8i2: The Operator is NOT liable for outages, loss of GT due to technical errors, DDoS attacks or hosting problems.
terms.s8i3: In case of a system failure the Operator will make efforts to restore the pre-incident state but does not guarantee full compensation.
terms.s8i4: The Portal may be shut down entirely at any time — in which case the Operator gives 30 days' notice.
terms.s9i1: The Operator reserves the right to change these terms.
terms.s9i2: Major changes are announced on Discord 7 days in advance.
terms.s9i3: Using the Portal after changes take effect means accepting them. If you disagree — delete your account.
terms.s10i1: These terms are governed by Polish law.
terms.s10i2: Matters not covered are subject to the Polish Civil Code and GDPR.
terms.s10i3: Disputes are resolved by the court competent for the Operator's place of residence, unless the Consumer chooses otherwise.

privacy.metaDesc: How Ghost Empire processes your personal data (GDPR).
privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.s1p: The controller of your personal data on the Ghost Empire portal (hereinafter: Portal) is Gh0s77tt — a streamer active on Twitch, Kick and Discord. GDPR contact: via the Discord server discord.gg/deAPJ9Ym2F — a direct message to the admin.
privacy.s2intro1: When you sign in via OAuth (Twitch / Discord), the Portal receives:
privacy.s2b1: Your email address (from your Twitch or Discord account)
privacy.s2b4: Your platform ID (Twitch User ID, Discord User ID — unique identifiers)
privacy.s2b5: OAuth access token and refresh token (to keep the session and refresh data)
privacy.s2b6: Your channel subscription status (if available via the API)
privacy.s2intro2: While you use the Portal we also collect:
privacy.s2c1: The number of Discord messages and time spent in voice — sent by the Discord bot
privacy.s2c2: Ghost Tokens transaction history (earned, spent, donations)
privacy.s2c3: Achievements earned, quests completed, items bought in the shop
privacy.s2c4: Request IP for administrative actions (audit log, for security purposes)
privacy.s3b1: Authorization: sign-in and session maintenance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — performance of a contract)
privacy.s3b2: Ghost Tokens economy: awarding rewards, fulfilling purchases, maintaining the ranking
privacy.s3b3: Subscriber identification: granting extra features to Twitch/Kick subs
privacy.s3b4: Security: admin action audit log, rate limiting, abuse detection (Art. 6(1)(f) — legitimate interest)
privacy.s4b1: Vercel Inc. (USA) — Portal hosting. Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC)
privacy.s4b2: Supabase Inc. (Frankfurt, EU) — database. Hosted in eu-central-1
privacy.s4b3: Twitch Interactive Inc. and Discord Inc. — OAuth providers, for authentication
privacy.s4b4: We do not sell or share data with marketers
privacy.s5b2: OAuth tokens: rotated automatically, old ones deleted
privacy.s5b4: Admin action audit log: indefinitely (for security and forensics)
privacy.s6b1: Right of access — you can request a copy of your data
privacy.s6b2: Right to rectification — we correct inaccurate data
privacy.s6b3: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten) — we delete the account and all related data
privacy.s6b5: Right to data portability — export in JSON format
privacy.s6b6: Right to lodge a complaint with the President of the UODO (https://uodo.gov.pl)
privacy.s6p: To exercise any right — message the admin of the <discord>Ghost Empire</discord> Discord server. We'll respond within 30 days.
privacy.s7b3: Content Security Policy, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy headers
privacy.s7b5: Atomic database transactions for economy operations
privacy.s7b6: Audit log with IP for all administrative actions
privacy.s7b7: OAuth passwords are NOT stored — we only use tokens
privacy.s8p: The Portal uses only technical cookies (the NextAuth session) — essential for it to function. We do not use tracking / marketing / analytics cookies.
privacy.s9p: We publish changes on this page. Major changes are announced on Discord. Using the Portal after changes take effect means accepting them.

about.metaDesc: What Ghost Empire is, how to earn Ghost Tokens and how to start.
about.heroSub1: The official community portal of streamer Gh0s77tt.
about.heroSub2: Collect Ghost Tokens for activity, redeem them for rewards, climb the ranking, win events.
about.whatP1: Ghost Empire is a community portal connecting Twitch, Kick, YouTube and Discord into one economy based on Ghost Tokens (GT).
about.whatP2: Tokens come in for every activity: chatting, voice, watching streams, entering drop codes, completing daily quests. Subs earn more. Streakers earn even more.
about.whatP3: What can you do with tokens? Redeem them for real rewards — Steam keys, CS2 skins, gifted Twitch subs, a custom Discord nickname color, 1-on-1 voice with Ghost, tickets to an offline meetup.
about.welcomeBonusNote: For your first sign-in. No strings attached.
about.featShopDesc: Steam keys, CS2 skins, gifted subs, voice with Ghost. Every reward for Ghost Tokens.
about.featRankDesc: 4 rankings: balance, lifetime earnings, level, streak. Top 100 + your position.
about.featEventsDesc: Giveaways, raffles, happy hours with x2 multipliers. Win real prizes.
about.featPredDesc: Bet on the stream outcome with Ghost Tokens. Winners split the whole pot proportionally to their stakes.
about.featPassDesc: Monthly seasons, 30 tiers. Earn XP for every activity and claim rewards from each level.
about.featAchDesc: 60 achievements: common, rare, epic, legendary. For level, prestige, streak, duels, casino, subs, donations.
about.featQuestDesc: 3 tasks every day: chat, voice, drop. Bonus reward for completing all at once.
about.featStreakDesc: Each active day = +1 to your streak. The longer it is, the bigger the daily bonus.
about.step1Desc: Via Twitch, Kick, Discord or Google/YouTube — your choice on the sign-in page. First sign-in = 500 GT welcome bonus.
about.step2Desc: Go to /profile and link the rest of your accounts to one profile. Subbed on Twitch and Kick at once = Dual Supporter.
about.step3Desc: Chat on Discord, hang out in voice, enter drop codes during live. Tokens roll in the background.
about.step4Desc: Go to /shop. Something for everyone — from 8,000 GT (nickname color) to 1,500,000 GT (a legendary skin).
about.earn1Desc: An active chat = tokens. A daily limit protects against spam.
about.earn2Desc: Spend time in voice channels with others. Tokens come in every minute.
about.earn3Desc: Ghost drops secret codes on stream. Be first to type it = bonus reward.
about.earn4Desc: Twitch/Kick subs, gifted subs and bits are detected automatically and rewarded with GT.
about.earn5Desc: A donation via Streamlabs or YouTube Super Chat = tokens + patron badges.
about.earn6Desc: A well-placed bet on /predictions = a share of the losers' pot for you.
about.earn7Desc: During an active Happy Hour all tokens come in double.
about.earn8Desc: 3 tasks a day. Finish them all = bonus pool.
about.socialsText: All the official Ghost Empire channels. Discord is the community hub — events, drop codes, support.
about.changelogIntro: Click an entry to expand details.
